dict.string:
# Python file that evaluates an input string using rink and returns the results. Rink is a CLI calculator utility import sys import os import json import re import shutil import subprocess
query = sys.argv[1]
candidates = [ os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "rink"), # bundled with workflow shutil.which("rink"), # on PATH os.path.expanduser("~/.cargo/bin/rink"), # cargo install location ] rink = next((p for p in candidates if p and os.path.isfile(p) and os.access(p, os.X_OK)), "rink") result = subprocess.run([rink, query], capture_output=True, text=True)
ansi = re.compile(r"\x1b\[[0-9;]*m") out = ansi.sub("", result.stdout).strip() last = out.split("\n")[-1] if out else ""
# Definition lookups echo as "Definition: name = value = approx. value (dim)" — keep the final segment. if last.startswith("Definition:") and " = " in last: last = last.split(" = ")[-1]
# Result lines look like "[approx. ]<value>[ <unit>] (<dimension>)". m = re.match(r"^(approx\. )?(.+?) \(([a-z][^)]*)\)\s*$", last)
if m: approx = m.group(1) is not None value_unit = m.group(2).strip() dimension = m.group(3).strip() title = ("≈ " if approx else "") + value_unit subtitle = f"{dimension} · {query}" if dimension != "dimensionless" else query copy_text = value_unit valid = True else: title = last or "Rink: no output" subtitle = query copy_text = last or query valid = False
items = [{ "title": title, "subtitle": subtitle, "valid": valid, "arg": copy_text, "text": {"copy": copy_text, "largetype": title}, }] output = {"items": items} json.dump(output, sys.stdout)
